Local coding models need compact Project Knowledge packets, source-backed context, and small verification prompts.

Project Knowledge should select the smallest relevant markdown sections instead of dumping the folder.

Use read-only tools before mutating tools when the model only needs context.

Use theme tokens instead of raw colors.

# Release Checklist
Run smoke tests before release.

Use concise UI copy.
